data.name: Stream Star: Sensations
data.detailed_description:
Master Your Stream

Stream "Stream Star: Sensations" to captivate viewers with a thrilling mix of gaming action and interactive streaming. Manage enjoyment, pain, and energy levels based on chat feedback, ensuring an engaging experience that resonates with both you and your audience.

Upgrade Your Room

"Stream Star: Sensations" lets you tailor your gaming experience with customizable room upgrades. Personalize the environment that suits your gamer's spirit and make every session memorable.

Dive into Research

Explore new dimensions of gameplay by conducting research at the Research Hub. Uncover innovative positions and scenarios, enhancing each stream with fresh dynamics for your audience.

data.short_description: Stream Star: Sensations is an erotic experience, where you stream explicit content for chat donations. Upgrade your space, discover new positions through research, and manage enjoyment for an engaging stream experience.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4670 3.40 GHz (4 Cores)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon RX 580
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
